title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: The marketing team discussed strategies for cleaning and targeting a list of 20,000 contacts in Zoo. They agreed to simplify contact segmentation and approved an immediate $2,000 spend for data cleansing and lead enrichment tools like Clay and Apollo. The importance of execution and involving the client success team was also emphasized.

decisions.description: Simplify contact segmentation into current customers, past customers, and cold leads.
Approve an immediate spend of $2,000 for data cleansing and lead enrichment tools like Clay and Apollo.

actionItems.task: Update the P&L piece for the critical meeting, specifically addressing the 2026 outlook.
Provide Vinnie Micciche with the list of technical subscriptions that have been canceled.

expectedOutcome.description: Email sent to Vinnie Micciche containing list of cancelled subscriptions.

actionItems.task: Launch the email distribution ASAP using the cleaned contact list.

expectedOutcome.description: Initial email campaign sent to the cleaned contact list.

actionItems.task: Work on the initial data cleansing and enrichment using Clay, with an initial budget of $2000 for launch.

expectedOutcome.description: Cleaned and enriched contact data in Clay.

actionItems.task: Perform a sample email campaign on the 25,000 records in Zoho to assess the bounce rate and data inaccuracy, and then reconcile the list so that irrelevant contacts are set as inactive.

expectedOutcome.description: Updated contact list in Zoho with irrelevant contacts set as inactive after bounce rate assessment.

tensions: Concern about wasted spend on new tools due to past issues with underutilized subscriptions.
Balancing speed and quality in the contact list cleansing strategy.
referencesToPast: Past issues with Zoom Info being too expensive and not cost-effective due to lack of utilization.
Prior calculation of revenue/AR growth figures using Claude was off by seven percentage points.
Past issues with signing up for tools that were not utilized or were wasteful.
